text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I'm walking past the gym...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Curses, I was so close to beating Ryan's record!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is that... Oh, you're one of the school's
trainers!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'm working on my free throw. I'm tryna beat
Mejiro Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ryan can nail way more consecutive free throws
than me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Which makes her... the thirty-ninth rival I gotta
defeat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You think so? I'm pretty sure that's kinda
average...
choice_data_list: Who else do you need to beat?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, Oguri is my race rival. Bakushin O is my club
head rival. Then, I have Biko who is my rival for
protecting the school's peace...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and I can't forget Fukukitaru! I'm competing
against her to see who can win the most ice pop
stick prizes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh crap! Today's supposed to be my ice pop
showdown with her! I almost forgot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'd better get going! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory hurriedly puts the basketball
away and runs out the exit.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Yep! I'm in it to win it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But I'm not doing this just to win, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
The true victory I'm aiming for is one achieved
after my rival and I have pushed each other to the
limit and battled our hearts out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's what a victorious victory really
means! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ack! What am I talking like such a big shot for?
I'm still just a greenhorn!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I didn't mean to be rude!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory dashes towards the exit and out
of the gym at the speed of light.
